summary: Comprehensive testing of Anfragen (Inquiries) feature for Graupner Suite. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: Anfragen page with category filters, convert/delete buttons, Dashboard anfragen stats, Customers page category filter, Customer modal categories, and public kontakt form with 5 categories.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/anfragen returns list of inquiries
Backend: POST /api/webhook/contact saves to anfragen collection (not customers)
Backend: Categories preserved when creating anfrage via webhook
Backend: GET /api/anfragen?category=X filters by category
Backend: DELETE /api/anfragen/{id} deletes inquiry
Backend: DELETE nonexistent anfrage returns 404
Backend: POST /api/anfragen/{id}/convert creates customer with preserved categories
Backend: POST /api/anfragen/{id}/convert deletes original anfrage
Backend: Convert nonexistent anfrage returns 404
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats includes anfragen section (total, by_category, recent)
Backend: Dashboard anfragen count updates correctly on create/delete
Backend: GET /api/kontakt returns HTML with all 5 categories
Frontend: Navigation sidebar shows 'Anfragen' between Dashboard and Kunden
Frontend: /anfragen page loads with category filter pills
Frontend: All 5 categories shown: Schiebetür, Fenster, Innentür, Eingangstür, Sonstige Reparaturen
Frontend: Anfragen page has search input
Frontend: Anfrage cards show name, date, categories, email, convert/delete buttons
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Neue Anfragen' stat card
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Letzte Anfragen' widget
Frontend: Dashboard has 'Anfragen' quick action button
Frontend: /customers page has category filter pills
Frontend: Customer modal has categories toggle buttons
Frontend: Kontakt form HTML has all 5 category checkboxes
critical_code_review_comments: All Anfragen CRUD endpoints properly implemented with authentication
Webhook correctly saves to anfragen collection instead of customers
Categories preserved through entire flow: webhook → anfrage → customer conversion
Dashboard stats properly aggregates anfragen by category
Frontend category filter pills use consistent styling across Anfragen and Customers pages
seed_data_creation: Test anfragen created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anfragen feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/anfragen (with optional category filter), POST /api/webhook/contact (creates anfrage), POST /api/anfragen/{id}/convert (converts to customer), DELETE /api/anfragen/{id}. Dashboard stats at GET /api/dashboard/stats includes anfragen section. Public kontakt form at GET /api/kontakt. All 5 categories: Schiebetür, Fenster, Innentür, Eingangstür, Sonstige Reparaturen.
